The 122-credit RN to BSN program is one of only three programs in the nation to be consecutively designated a Center of Excellence in Nursing Education by the National League for Nursing. Courses explore topics such as imperatives for global and public health, cultural influences on health beliefs and practices, and principles for nutrition. Online courses are delivered through Blackboard and utilize both asynchronous and synchronous learning methods. oedb_description: Viterbo University in La Crosse, Wis., offers an online accounting degree designed for individuals who already hold an accounting associate degree or have completed certain prerequisite accounting courses. Viterbo is a private Roman Catholic and Franciscan institution, and all students must take two religious courses. The bachelor’s of business administration in accounting program at Viterbo can be earned 100% online, with no on-campus requirements. The program has a generous transfer credit policy, allowing transfer students to earn their bachelor’s more quickly. Students can also apply to get academic credit for prior learning received through on-the-job training and experience. Graduates of the program are prepared to take the CPA exam upon completing 150 credit hours. Online students benefit from special online tutoring, eight-week terms, and personal advising services. Courses offered include external reporting to strategic management, applied business statistics to legal aspects of financial and commercial transactions.

oedb_description: Distance learners searching for online accounting degree programs find a bachelor’s of science in accounting at the Carson College of Business at Washington State University. Located in Pullman, WSU is a public research school serving close to 30,000 students each year. The degree stands out for its emphasis on technology and intellectual innovation. WSU’s flexible online format features seven-week courses, and students can attend either part- or full-time. The curriculum is available entirely online, with no on-campus requirements. Each learner works with a special online advisor to plan out their program of study. To earn the BS, students must complete the university’s general education requirements, which can be satisfied with a direct transfer degree, as well as business and accounting courses. The program requires a six-credit international experience , designed to ensure that students find success in the global marketplace. Numerous options exist for fulfilling the requirements, including coursework, study abroad, and international internships.

oedb_description: Located in Saint Louis, Missouri, Webster University caters to working professionals and other nontraditional students through its distance education platform. The online bachelor of of arts in management focuses on strengthening the relationship between supervisors and employees within a business environment. The degree plan totals 128 credits and includes 39 hours of coursework in topics like business technologies, marketing, and descriptive statistics. Degree candidates must complete a senior capstone experience in managerial policies and strategies. The curriculum also includes a large number of elective hours which students can use to pursue a complimentary minor at Webster or fulfill with transfer credits. Admission materials include relevant academic records and standardized test scores. Freshman applicants must also write a personal statement and provide at least one letter of recommendation.

oedb_description: Westfield State University is a Massachusetts state-run college that has been in the business of education for 175 years. The school is historically known for being one of the first colleges to accept people of all races, religions, and financial backgrounds. The online bachelor’s of science in criminal justice is a degree completion program for students who have already completed two years of college courses. Criminal justice classes online include theories of crime, American judicial system, and law enforcement and society. Westfield has a compact with local Massachusetts community colleges allowing students to finish their last two years of school online through Westfield. Classes run on a 15-week semester for fall and spring. There are also two six-week summer sessions and an accelerated two-week winter class. Westfield provides an online orientation for all students participating in the completion program.

oedb_description: Founded in 1849 in Liberty, Missouri, Jewell's online offerings include an RN to BSN program that is ideal for students balancing school with work or family commitments. The program is accredited by the Commission on Collegiate Nursing Education. Students may complete the 124-credit program on a full- or part-time basis. Required courses include community health nursing, critical care nursing, and healthcare and its role in society. The curriculum includes practice experience and in-person direct and indirect care components. Applicants must have a 2.7 GPA and must submit two references and a written profile of relevant experience. Applicants must have completed 62 to 66 credits of previous coursework.

oedb_description: With a historic campus based in Chambersburg, Pennsylvania, Wilson is a national leader in liberal arts education. Wilson offers one of the best online RN to BSN programs in the country. The program is accredited by the National League for Nursing Commission for Nursing Education Accreditation. Wilson's 120-credit RN to BSN program blends a liberal arts education with nursing requirements. Students take classes in family and community structures, economic policy, and global interdependence. Core requirements in role transitions, research, and evidence-based practice reflect the program’s holistic approach. Online coursework is delivered through Canvas, and full-time students complete the program in about two years. Applicants must have at least a 2.7 GPA.

oedb_description: Located in the vibrant city of Milwaukee, Wisconsin Lutheran College enrolls 1,200 students annually in its traditional and distance education programs. The school offers an online bachelor of science in business management and leadership catered to adult learners who want to accelerate their career by learning from experts in the field. Students engage with their peers through collaborative assignments. Major coursework includes human resources management, leading organizational change, and business diversity. This online business degree is offered in an accelerated format, enabling students to earn their diploma in as few as 21 months if they have the necessary general education and prerequisite requirements. Distance learners also gain access to professional development tools through the Student Success Center. Each student gets a personal academic advisor. Additionally, WLU offers a flat and affordable online tuition rate for the 48 credit hours it takes to complete major requirements.
